info.description: Go Fiber rewrite of the ClashKing API.
info.title: ClashKingAPI

post.description: Returns raid weekend documents for up to one hundred clan tags.

get.description: Returns capital raid weekends for the requested weekend.
Returns capital raid weekends grouped as league stats for the requested weekend.
Returns raid weekend logs for a clan tag.
Returns clans filtered by location, membership, and limit options.
Returns the cached clan object for a clan tag.
Returns historical player data for a clan tag.
Returns join and leave history for a clan tag.
Returns clan and member activity totals for a Discord guild.
Returns players in the guild that are considered inactive by the provided threshold.

parameters.description: Days before a player is considered inactive
parameters.name: inactive_threshold_days

parameters.description: Restrict results to a single clan
parameters.name: clan_tag

post.description: Exchanges Discord OAuth credentials for a ClashKing session.
Validates email/password credentials and returns access and refresh tokens.
Issues a password reset code for the matching email account.
Placeholder endpoint for Discord account linking.
post.summary: Link Discord to an existing account

post.description: Attaches email credentials to the authenticated account.
post.summary: Link Email to an existing Discord account

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current profile information.

post.description: Validates a refresh token and returns a new access token for the same user.
Creates a pending email registration and issues a verification code.
Resends the verification code for a pending email registration.
Validates a password reset token and updates the account password.
Confirms a pending email registration by checking the verification code and creates the account session.

get.description: Returns a capital leaderboard for all clans attached to the requested guild.
Returns raid weekend player rows for the requested guild and clan tags.
Returns town hall, role, and league composition for the requested clan tags.
get.summary: Get composition of a clan or clans

get.description: Returns donation totals for multiple clans in a season.
Returns aggregate board totals for one or more player tags.
get.summary: Get aggregated board totals for a clan

get.description: Returns the live clan object for a clan tag.
get.summary: Get full stats for a single clan

get.description: Returns donation totals for a single clan and season.
Returns join and leave history for a single clan tag.
Returns the current members for a clan tag.
Returns the cached ranking document for a clan tag.

post.description: Returns raid weekend documents for the requested clan tags.
post.summary: Get capital raids for a list of clans

post.description: Returns detailed clan objects for the requested clan tags.
post.summary: Get full stats for a list of clans

post.description: Returns join and leave history for multiple clan tags.

get.description: Returns client-safe configuration values.
Returns the static CWL promotion and demotion thresholds list.
get.summary: Promo and demotion thresholds for CWL leagues

get.description: Returns CWL ranking history rows for a clan tag.
get.summary: CWL ranking history for a clan

get.description: Returns current season and event date identifiers.
Returns the current raid weekend or a list of recent raid weekend dates.

parameters.description: Number of raid weekends to return
parameters.name: number_of_weeks

get.description: Returns raid weekend dates for the requested season.
Returns RFC3339 season boundaries for the requested season identifier.
Returns the current season or a list of previous seasons.
Returns guild metadata for the requested server identifier.
Returns the authenticated user's guilds and whether the bot is present.
get.summary: Get user guilds with bot status

get.description: Returns daily tracking rows for a guild and optional day.
Returns legends leaderboard and player stats for a guild.

post.description: Returns a minimal initialization payload for the mobile app based on the supplied player tags.
post.summary: Initialize all account data for mobile app

get.description: Returns client-safe configuration values for the mobile app.

post.description: Currently returns not implemented.
Currently returns not implemented.

Currently returns not implemented.

Currently returns not implemented.

post.description: Currently returns not implemented.
Currently returns not implemented.
Currently returns not implemented.

get.description: Currently returns not implemented.
Returns every configured role group for the server.
Returns the configured autoboards and counts for the server.

post.description: Creates a new autoboard for the given server.

delete.description: Deletes an existing autoboard by ID.

patch.description: Updates an existing autoboard by ID.

get.description: Returns the ban list for the server.

post.description: Creates a ban entry or updates the existing one for the given player tag.

delete.description: Deletes the ban entry for the given player tag on the server.

get.description: Returns an empty list for endpoints that currently have no backing data in the Go port.
Returns the full clan log documents for the server.
Returns the configured countdown state for a clan on the server.

put.description: Replaces the stored logs document for the given clan on the server.

delete.description: Clears the stored logs document for the given clan on the server.

get.description: Returns the stored clan settings document for the given server and clan tag.
get.summary: Get clan settings for a server

patch.description: Updates the stored settings for a clan attached to a server.

get.description: Returns the clans stored on the server.

post.description: Adds a clan to the server configuration.

get.description: Returns a lightweight list of clans for the server.

delete.description: Removes a clan from the server configuration.

get.description: Returns the configured countdown state for the server.

post.description: Enables a countdown for the server or a clan, depending on the countdown type.

delete.description: Disables a countdown for the server or a clan, depending on the countdown type.

get.description: Currently returns not implemented.
Returns an empty list for endpoints that currently have no backing data in the Go port.
Currently returns not implemented.

put.description: Updates the Discord embed color stored for the server.

get.description: Returns family role documents for the server.

post.description: Creates a family role entry for the requested role type.

delete.description: Deletes a family role entry for the requested role type.

get.description: Returns member link data grouped by Discord user ID for the server.

post.description: Removes multiple player tags from a Discord member on the server.

delete.description: Removes a single player tag from a Discord member on the server.

get.description: Returns the configured log wiring for the server and its clans.

put.description: Updates the configured webhook/thread pairs for one or more server log categories.

patch.description: Updates the stored configuration for a specific server log type.

get.description: Returns reminders grouped by reminder type for the server.

post.description: Creates a reminder for the given server.

put.description: Updates an existing reminder for the given server.

delete.description: Deletes an existing reminder for the given server.

get.description: Returns the server's role settings document.

patch.description: Applies a partial update to the server's role settings.

get.description: Returns the configured roles for the requested role type.

post.description: Creates a role for the requested role type.

delete.description: Deletes a role for the requested role type.

get.description: Returns the stored settings for a server, optionally including clan settings.

patch.description: Applies a partial update to the server settings document.

get.description: Returns strike list entries for the server, optionally filtered by player tag or expiry state.
Returns strike summary information for a single player on the server.

post.description: Creates a strike entry for a player on the server.

delete.description: Removes a strike entry from the server.

get.description: Returns an empty list for endpoints that currently have no backing data in the Go port.
Returns all available static data categories and item counts.
Returns static items for a category, with optional filters applied.
Returns the names of static items for a category, with optional filters applied.
Returns a static data item resolved by item ID or name.
Returns the highest level defined for a static item.
Returns the authenticated user's linked Clash of Clans accounts in order.
get.summary: Get all Clash of Clans accounts linked to a user

post.description: Links a Clash of Clans account to the authenticated user.
post.summary: Link a Clash of Clans account to a user

put.description: Reorders the authenticated user's linked Clash of Clans accounts.
put.summary: Reorder linked Clash of Clans accounts

post.description: Links a Clash of Clans account to the authenticated user after verifying the player token.
post.summary: Link a Clash of Clans account to a user with verification

delete.description: Unlinks a Clash of Clans account from the authenticated user.
delete.summary: Remove a linked Clash of Clans account

get.description: Checks whether a Clash of Clans account is linked to any user.
get.summary: Check if a Clash of Clans account is linked

post.description: Verifies ownership of a linked account using the provided player token.
post.summary: Verify ownership of an existing linked Clash of Clans account

get.description: Returns the number of wars for the requested clan tags.

post.description: Returns war hit rows for the requested clan tags.
Returns war hit rows for the requested player tags.
Returns current war summary data for multiple clan tags.
post.summary: Get full war summary for multiple clans

get.description: Returns previous wars for a clan tag, optionally filtered to CWL.
Returns current war summary data for a single clan tag.
get.summary: Get war summary for a clan
